Arjun Sharma
arjun.sharma@email.com | +91-98765-43210 | github.com/arjunsharma | linkedin.com/in/arjunsharma
Bengaluru, Karnataka

SUMMARY
Senior Backend Engineer with 7 years of experience building high-throughput Python microservices at scale. AWS Certified Solutions Architect. Deep expertise in FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker, and Kubernetes. Led teams of 8 engineers delivering platform infrastructure serving 500K+ RPS. Open-source contributor with 2K GitHub stars across projects.

WORK EXPERIENCE

Senior Software Engineer — Platform Engineering
DataNova Technologies, Bengaluru
July 2021 – Present

- Architected and led development of a real-time event processing platform handling 500,000 requests per second using FastAPI async workers and Kafka; reduced P99 latency from 450ms to 38ms
- Led a team of 8 backend engineers across 3 time zones; conducted weekly 1:1s, quarterly performance reviews, and technical interviews for 30+ candidates
- Designed PostgreSQL schema for multi-tenant SaaS platform; implemented row-level security, partial indexes, and connection pooling (PgBouncer) cutting query costs by 62%
- Migrated 14 Django monolith services to FastAPI microservices deployed on Kubernetes (EKS); automated rollouts with GitHub Actions CI/CD; zero downtime migrations
- Built AWS infrastructure using Terraform: VPC, ECS, RDS Multi-AZ, CloudFront, S3 lifecycle policies; reduced monthly AWS spend by $18K through right-sizing
- Implemented distributed tracing with OpenTelemetry + Jaeger across all microservices; MTTD dropped from 2.1 hours to 11 minutes

Software Engineer — Backend
CloudSprint Pvt. Ltd., Pune
June 2019 – June 2021

- Built REST APIs in Django REST Framework serving 80K daily active users; implemented JWT authentication, rate limiting, and API versioning
- Designed Redis caching layer reducing database load by 70% on hot read paths
- Containerised 6 legacy applications using Docker; wrote multi-stage Dockerfiles reducing image sizes by 55%
- Deployed services on AWS EC2 and ECS; configured Auto Scaling Groups and Application Load Balancers
- Mentored 3 junior engineers; introduced code review culture and reduced bug escape rate by 40%

Software Engineer — Junior
WebStack Solutions, Hyderabad
August 2017 – May 2019

- Developed Python Flask APIs for internal tooling and client dashboards
- Wrote unit tests with pytest achieving 85% coverage on core modules
- Worked with PostgreSQL and MySQL for data storage and reporting queries

EDUCATION

MS in Computer Science — Machine Learning Track
Carnegie Mellon University, Pittsburgh, USA
August 2015 – May 2017 | GPA: 3.87/4.0
Thesis: Efficient Approximate Nearest Neighbour Search for High-Dimensional Embeddings

BS in Computer Science and Engineering
IIT Bombay, Mumbai, India
August 2011 – May 2015 | GPA: 8.9/10 (Silver Medallist)

SKILLS

Languages: Python (expert), Go (proficient), SQL, Bash
Frameworks: FastAPI, Django, Flask, gRPC, Celery
Databases: PostgreSQL, Redis, MongoDB, DynamoDB
Cloud: AWS (EC2, ECS, EKS, S3, RDS, Lambda, IAM, CloudFront, CloudWatch) — AWS Certified Solutions Architect

CERTIFICATIONS

- AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate (2022, renewed 2024)
- Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA) — CNCF (2023)

OPEN SOURCE & PROJECTS

fastapi-auth-kit (github.com/arjunsharma/fastapi-auth-kit) — 2,100 GitHub stars
A production-ready authentication library for FastAPI with JWT, OAuth2, rate limiting, and audit logging. Used by 400+ projects.

pg-query-explainer — 340 GitHub stars
CLI tool to parse and visualise PostgreSQL EXPLAIN ANALYZE output; contributed back to psql community.

AWARDS & RECOGNITION

- "Engineer of the Year" — DataNova Technologies, 2023
- Finalist, ACM ICPC Asia Regional, 2014
- Recipient, Google India PhD Fellowship (declined to pursue industry), 2017
